revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-2-170

Rotary device, driven from the camshaft of an internal combustion engine, that interrupts the direct current in the primary winding of the induction coil and transmits high voltages in correct sequence to the spark plugs.

{{IALAFooter}}
